entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop Arachis hypogaea L. studied for outcrossing rates.

entities.name: OUTCROSSING
entities.description: The process of mating between unrelated individuals in groundnut varieties.

entities.name: RECTANGULAR CROSSING DESIGN
entities.description: An experimental layout used to estimate the percentage of outcrossing.

entities.name: KRINKLE DOMINANT LEAF MARKER
entities.description: A dominant leaf marker used to identify outcrossed plants in the crossing design.

entities.name: POSTRAINY SEASON
entities.description: The environmental period during which a marked increase in outcrossing was observed.

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The environmental period during which outcrossing was measured and compared.

entities.name: ICRISAT CENTRE
entities.description: The research center where the three-year study was conducted.

entities.name: SPANISH TYPE
entities.description: A botanical type of groundnut that showed slightly greater outcrossing.

entities.name: VALENCIA TYPE
entities.description: A botanical type of groundnut that showed slightly greater outcrossing.

entities.name: VIRGINIA TYPE
entities.description: A botanical type of groundnut that showed lower outcrossing compared to Spanish and Valencia types.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT BREEDING
entities.description: The process of improving groundnut varieties by utilizing outcrossing.
